item.title: Damn Those Migrants Taking "Black Jobs ..."
item.description: Black leaders in Congress responded to Trump’s comment by sharing photos of themselves working at their “Black jobs”. Representative Stacey Plaskett of the US Virgin Islands shared a photo of her and her colleagues working, “another day in Congress doing our ‘Black jobs.’” https://news.yahoo.com/news/hello-black-job-black-democrats-164140570.html
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.dc:creator: BobistmirAlice

item.title: Day 7 of Making BG3 Shadowheart Wavemother's Robe cosplay - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.youtube.com/@yuzupyon LAST DAY FINALLY !!! Painting and attachments day :) Thank you for joining me in this crafting adventure! I actually have more educational and funny content of this project that I would like to share with the community : transformation video, makeup and wig installation tutorial, photoshoot BTS and such, what would you like to see first ? :) If you missed the first episodes you can rewatch them on my Youtube playlist here : https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL7HkJr8T77ZR2LRnwALisiqCINOlcEbaD And the pictures I took outdoor in this costume will be posted on my IG account if you're curious to see more ! https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon Have an excellent day all :)!
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Random stolen memes dump
item.dc:creator: MayMayz4DayzYo

item.title: Monday Summer Meme dump to help you trough the heat wave (no politics)
item.description:
1. American are asleep, upvote superior European culture
2. Heart attack in 3, 2, 1
3
4
5. Or about wolves
6. When you play as a fried potato
7, Mark slipped...
8. Everybodyyyy
9
10. This is how to live carefree
11. Poor cat
12
13. It's OVER
14. Mom with the superior meme
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky game called Do Not Press The Button, and it's tone and style are kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable. Here is an inspiration quote within the game! If you liked the humor in this dump, you would probably like the game. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a happy week, gang!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
i like both? greetings online friends
better than on the seats?
it definitely is
now that is art
looks like Two-Face
we need a new bill to spice things up
it's a chess-ire cat
sure could go for some cocaine right now
mmm hmm
accurate
probably not the first candy i'd pick but they are really good
funny that they are in Plant City
sure why not
i knew that
nope
totally
think i'm going Alfredo
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: In VS Out of Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here— I had an appearance at a local comic expo today and then went out to dinner with my family after, which inspired me to do this little side by side. Can’t take credit here: suit, cape, and bracers (not pictured) made by jcurtis_atelier, mask and belt from Etsy.
Here’s a bonus pic, cause I didn’t have the gloves+bracers on in the other one.

item.title: Parabolic cigarette lighter
item.dc:creator: Boxzsak

item.title: Penelope passed last night at home. She was 12 and a good girl.
item.description: We lost Havok this month to Cancer and Penelope passed at home. She was really old for her breed. Gracie, their daughter is the only pupper left here now and she’s never been without her family. She’s a bit of a wreck. We’ll be adding a new pupper sometime in the next couple of months, depending on how Gracie does.. Penelope tried to keep up when Gracie wanted to play, but like most old folks, she just wanted a drink and a nap most of the time. You’ll be missed old girl.
item.dc:creator: charondaboatman

item.title: We Found A Wall Safe Part 2: The Opening!
item.description:
A month ago I posted on Reddit that we found a wall safe. Today I worked on cracking it! Big thanks to @MBSAFCRKR for the remote assistance.
Woot! Combo: 10-20-41
Damn! Empty.
Wait, what's that!?
Hmmmm
Buried treasure perhaps?
Double damn! Thanks everyone!
item.dc:creator: PunkRoth
